2605.30593.title: Scientific Machine Learning for Engine Health Management and Remaining Useful Life Prediction
2605.30593.paper_summary: Engine Health Management (EHM) depends on reliable forecasting of Remaining Useful Life (RUL) and on tracking thermal indicators such as turbine gas temperature (TGT). In practice, real-world fleet data are heterogeneous and non-stationary, and point predictions alone are insufficient for risk-aware maintenance decisions. This paper presents a multi-task scientific machine learning framework for turbine prognostics that jointly predicts turbine gas temperature untrimmed (TGTU), Delta Turbine Gas Temperature (DTGT), and RUL, with quantified uncertainty in the form of prediction intervals whose empirical coverage is evaluated. A shared sequence encoder (convolutional front-end with residual bidirectional LSTM layers and attention pooling) feeds task-specific heads, including mean--variance estimation for probabilistic regression and, optionally, a survival head for threshold-based event modeling. The framework is designed to be tunable via a small set of practitioner-facing parameters (e.g., DTGT thresholding rules and RUL target construction) so that deployment can align with in-house policies and proprietary criteria. The predictive performance of the proposed framework is evaluated using both point and interval metrics, including mean absolute error (MAE), prediction interval coverage probability (PICP), mean prediction interval width (MPIW), and the coverage--width criterion (CWC). Results are reported both in aggregate and stratified by flight phase and maintenance segment to highlight operational-context effects and to support uncertainty-aware monitoring.
2605.30593.paper_summary_zh: 引擎健康管理（EHM）依賴於對剩餘使用壽命（RUL）的可靠預測，以及對熱指標如渦輪氣體溫度（TGT）的追蹤。實際上，現實世界的艦隊數據是異質的且非平穩的，僅有的點預測不足以支持風險意識的維護決策。本文提出了一個多任務科學機器學習框架，用於渦輪預測，該框架共同預測未修整的渦輪氣體溫度（TGTU）、渦輪氣體溫度變化（DTGT）和RUL，並以預測區間的形式量化不確定性，評估其經驗覆蓋率。共享序列編碼器（帶有殘差雙向LSTM層和注意力池化的卷積前端）為任務特定的頭部提供數據，包括用於概率回歸的均值-方差估計，並可選擇性地提供基於閾值的事件建模的生存頭。該框架旨在通過一小組面向實踐者的參數（例如，DTGT閾值規則和RUL目標構建）進行調整，以便部署能夠與內部政策和專有標準對齊。所提出框架的預測性能使用點和區間指標進行評估，包括平均絕對誤差（MAE）、預測區間覆蓋概率（PICP）、平均預測區間寬度（MPIW）和覆蓋-寬度標準（CWC）。結果以總體和按飛行階段及維護段進行分層報告，以突顯操作上下文的影響並支持不確定性意識的監控。
2605.30593.author: Jostein Barry-Straume et.al.
2605.30593.authors: Jostein Barry-Straume, Changmin Son, Adrian Sandu, Gavan Burke, Rekha Sundararajan, Andrew Rimell, James G. Steinrock
